{{CargoOrgan
|name=Helllord Corpus
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10709
|idx=67
|description=Infused with stardust, inlaid within flesh, this body bears cryptic markings — the silent will of the stars. No blade can pierce it.
|skill=Summon the Infernal Shield, dealing DMG equal to 220% of ATK!
|hp=1960
|def=377
|atk=265
|rush=232
|gene1=CRIT DMG REDUC +10%
|gene2=Each round, {race} DEF +80
|gene3=All ELMT RES +40
|gene4=Wind DMG +120
|gene5=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene6=RUSH CRIT DMG +10%
|gene7=Wind DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
